posts.author: HBG (Victor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I am trying to download multiple files of one specific item all in file column. webhook is set and get item works. The problem I have is that when I am mapping the “download a file” module from the get item it finds only 1 file (the first one) and not able to to find and map any of the other files.

Any idea what am I do wrong?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
